markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on GTM strategy and refine outreach processes.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New GTM Model:** GrowthX will own "white glove" relationships; Understory will own cold outreach. This requires a clean, segmented contact list to prevent messaging known contacts.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [**New Outreach Playbook:** Understory will proactively mine competitor events and LinkedIn engagement for leads. All campaigns must be documented in Notion for pre-approval.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [**Performance & Strategy:** LinkedIn outreach is effective (\>20% reply rate) for event registrations. Cold email (1 reply/262 leads) is too inefficient for high-ACV agency sales but will be tested for a new, lower-ACV product.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [**Blocker:** GrowthX's agency is at capacity (booked through EOY). New leads are not needed for this service, but Understory will help prove out the GTM motion for the new, lower-ACV product.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)

## Topics

### GTM Model & Process Refinement

  - [**Problem:** Outreach campaigns have messaged known contacts and competitors (e.g., AirOps), risking the partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [**Cause:** Unclear contact ownership and a lack of a clean blocklist.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new GTM model with clear responsibilities:](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Owns "white glove" relationships (customers, funnel contacts, engaged event attendees).](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [**Understory:** Owns cold outreach to a clean, segmented list.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [**Process Change:** All campaigns must be documented in Notion for pre-approval to ensure alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)

### Outreach Performance & Strategy

  - [**Webflow Webinar Campaign Results:**](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
      - [**LinkedIn (HeyReach):** \>20% reply rate (41 replies from 184 messages).](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
      - [**Cold Email (Instantly):** 1 reply per 262 leads (12 interested replies from 3k new contacts).](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:**](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
      - [**LinkedIn:** Continue for event registrations; add more sender accounts to increase volume.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
      - [**Cold Email:** Pause for high-ACV agency sales.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Low reply rate is inefficient for a service with a booked pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
          - [**Future Use:** Test the motion for a new, lower-ACV product launching in \~2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)

### New Outreach Playbook

  - [**Goal:** Proactively mine competitor activity for leads.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [**Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
      - [Scrape competitor LinkedIn followers (e.g., Profound, Airhouse).](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
      - [Scrape engagement from competitor LinkedIn posts.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
      - [Mine attendee lists from competitor events.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [**Copy:** Understory will create a tone guide based on GrowthX's revised copy to enable independent campaign execution.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
      - [Create a clean, segmented contact list in HubSpot to serve as the blocklist.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
      - [Provide past copy examples for the tone guide.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
      - [Share details for upcoming events.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [**Understory:**](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
      - [Document all campaign plans in Notion for pre-approval.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
      - [Create the copy tone guide.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
      - [Begin mining competitor LinkedIn activity for leads.](https://fathom.video/share/q5HR4bwqwDMU6xyL7GqVTp63qjLwJU_4?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
